decision.summary: Keep current positions as-is and do not open a new one.
decision.rationale: Current open positions are a resolved 69k March 27 No at 1.0, which can continue to natural settlement, and a March 28 66k dip Yes now priced at 65.5%, still well above the 20% stop-loss threshold and below take-profit. Beecthor’s latest thesis remains broadly bearish with 65k as the key support and 62.7k/59k as downside targets if weakness resumes; Binance at 66342.26 still reflects soft structure rather than a clean bullish reversal. With two positions already open, no additional entry is allowed under the playbook’s maximum simultaneous exposure rule.
